CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS SpaceMissions (id INT PRIMARY KEY, mission_name VARCHAR(100), agency VARCHAR(50), country VARCHAR(50), launch_year INT, end_year INT, duration_days INT, crew_size INT, destination VARCHAR(60), mission_type VARCHAR(40), outcome VARCHAR(20), rocket VARCHAR(80), cost_million_usd DECIMAL(10,1), notable_achievement TEXT)

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (1, 'Vostok 1', 'Roscosmos', 'Soviet Union', 1961, 1961, 0, 1, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Crewed Orbital', 'Success', 'Vostok-K', NULL, 'First human in space — Yuri Gagarin completed one orbit of Earth.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (2, 'Apollo 11', 'NASA', 'United States', 1969, 1969, 8, 3, 'Moon', 'Crewed Lunar Landing', 'Success', 'Saturn V', 355.0, 'First humans to walk on the Moon — Neil Armstrong and Buzz Aldrin.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (3, 'Apollo 13', 'NASA', 'United States', 1970, 1970, 6, 3, 'Moon', 'Crewed Lunar Landing', 'Partial Failure', 'Saturn V', 355.0, 'Survived an oxygen tank explosion; crew returned safely without landing.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (4, 'Voyager 1', 'NASA', 'United States', 1977, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Outer Solar System', 'Robotic Flyby', 'Success', 'Titan IIIE', 865.0, 'Farthest human-made object from Earth; entered interstellar space in 2012.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (5, 'Voyager 2', 'NASA', 'United States', 1977, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Outer Solar System', 'Robotic Flyby', 'Success', 'Titan IIIE', 865.0, 'Only spacecraft to visit Uranus and Neptune; still transmitting data.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (6, 'Hubble Space Telescope', 'NASA', 'United States', 1990, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Space Observatory', 'Success', 'Space Shuttle Discovery', 4700.0, 'Revolutionized astronomy with deep-field images revealing thousands of distant galaxies.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (7, 'STS-51-L Challenger', 'NASA', 'United States', 1986, 1986, 0, 7, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Crewed Orbital', 'Failure', 'Space Shuttle Challenger', 1200.0, 'Shuttle broke apart 73 seconds after launch; all seven crew members lost.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (8, 'Mars Pathfinder', 'NASA', 'United States', 1996, 1997, 83, 0, 'Mars', 'Robotic Lander', 'Success', 'Delta II', 265.0, 'Deployed Sojourner, the first rover to operate on Mars.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (9, 'International Space Station', 'NASA', 'United States', 1998, NULL, NULL, 6, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Space Station', 'Success', 'Multiple Rockets', 150000.0, 'Largest structure ever built in space; continuously inhabited since November 2000.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (10, 'Cassini-Huygens', 'NASA', 'United States', 1997, 2017, 7286, 0, 'Saturn', 'Robotic Orbiter', 'Success', 'Titan IVB', 3260.0, 'Orbited Saturn for 13 years; Huygens probe landed on Titan, its largest moon.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (11, 'Spirit Rover', 'NASA', 'United States', 2003, 2010, 2269, 0, 'Mars', 'Robotic Rover', 'Success', 'Delta II', 410.0, 'Designed for 90 days, operated for over 6 years exploring Gusev Crater on Mars.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (12, 'Curiosity Rover', 'NASA', 'United States', 2011, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Mars', 'Robotic Rover', 'Success', 'Atlas V', 2500.0, 'Found evidence that Mars once had conditions suitable for microbial life.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (13, 'New Horizons', 'NASA', 'United States', 2006, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Pluto', 'Robotic Flyby', 'Success', 'Atlas V', 780.0, 'First spacecraft to fly by Pluto, revealing its heart-shaped nitrogen glacier.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (14, 'Chandrayaan-1', 'ISRO', 'India', 2008, 2009, 312, 0, 'Moon', 'Robotic Orbiter', 'Partial Failure', 'PSLV-XL', 56.0, 'Discovered water molecules on the lunar surface; contact lost earlier than planned.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (15, 'Chang''e 4', 'CNSA', 'China', 2018, 2019, 365, 0, 'Moon', 'Robotic Lander', 'Success', 'Long March 3B', 180.0, 'First spacecraft to land on the far side of the Moon.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (16, 'James Webb Space Telescope', 'NASA', 'United States', 2021, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Sun-Earth L2 Point', 'Space Observatory', 'Success', 'Ariane 5', 10000.0, 'Most powerful space telescope ever built; captures infrared images of the earliest galaxies.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (17, 'Perseverance Rover', 'NASA', 'United States', 2020, NULL, NULL, 0, 'Mars', 'Robotic Rover', 'Success', 'Atlas V', 2700.0, 'Carried Ingenuity, the first helicopter to achieve powered flight on another planet.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (18, 'Gaganyaan Uncrewed Test', 'ISRO', 'India', 2025, 2025, 1, 0, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Uncrewed Test', 'Success', 'LVM3', 1300.0, 'Key test flight ahead of India''s first crewed space mission.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (19, 'Rosetta', 'ESA', 'Europe', 2004, 2016, 4599, 0, 'Comet 67P', 'Robotic Orbiter', 'Success', 'Ariane 5', 1700.0, 'First spacecraft to orbit a comet and deploy a lander (Philae) on its surface.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (20, 'Hayabusa2', 'JAXA', 'Japan', 2014, 2020, 2192, 0, 'Asteroid Ryugu', 'Robotic Sample Return', 'Success', 'H-IIA', 150.0, 'Collected subsurface samples from asteroid Ryugu and returned them to Earth.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (21, 'Shenzhou 5', 'CNSA', 'China', 2003, 2003, 1, 1, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Crewed Orbital', 'Success', 'Long March 2F', 2300.0, 'Yang Liwei became the first Chinese astronaut (taikonaut) in space.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (22, 'Mars Orbiter Mission', 'ISRO', 'India', 2013, 2022, 3283, 0, 'Mars', 'Robotic Orbiter', 'Success', 'PSLV-XL', 74.0, 'India became the first Asian nation to reach Mars orbit; cost less than the movie Gravity.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (23, 'Crew Dragon Demo-2', 'SpaceX', 'United States', 2020, 2020, 64, 2, 'Low Earth Orbit', 'Crewed Orbital', 'Success', 'Falcon 9', 55.0, 'First crewed orbital flight by a private company; returned crew from ISS.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (24, 'Beresheet', 'SpaceIL', 'Israel', 2019, 2019, 49, 0, 'Moon', 'Robotic Lander', 'Failure', 'Falcon 9', 100.0, 'First privately funded lunar lander; crashed during final descent.')

INSERT INTO SpaceMissions (id, mission_name, agency, country, launch_year, end_year, duration_days, crew_size, destination, mission_type, outcome, rocket, cost_million_usd, notable_achievement) VALUES (25, 'OSIRIS-REx', 'NASA', 'United States', 2016, 2023, 2555, 0, 'Asteroid Bennu', 'Robotic Sample Return', 'Success', 'Atlas V', 1160.0, 'Collected and returned the largest asteroid sample ever — about 121 grams from Bennu.')
